SERVICE WAS NOT PROPERLY MADE AND DID NOT RESULT IN DEFENDANT RECEIVING ACTUAL NOTICE. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
